\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3623 introduces Dsdlaecs Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} d(\mathbf{u},\mathbf{v}) = \arccos(\mathbf{u}\cdot\mathbf{v}). \end{equation}
